problems.title: Sum Two Numbers
problems.prompt: Write a function that takes two numbers and returns their sum.
hints: Use the + operator to add two numbers
Make sure to return the result

problems.title: Reverse String
problems.prompt: Write a function that reverses a string.
hints: You can convert a string to an array with split('')
Convert back to string with join('')

problems.title: Fibonacci Sequence
problems.prompt: Write a function that returns the nth number in the Fibonacci sequence.
hints: Consider using iteration instead of recursion for better performance
Start with base cases for n=0 and n=1

problems.title: Binary Search
problems.prompt: Implement binary search to find a target value in a sorted array. Return the index or -1 if not found.
hints: Binary search works on sorted arrays by dividing the search space in half
Use two pointers: left and right
Compare the middle element with the target
Adjust the search space based on the comparison
